greeting.speaker: Agent Harlow
greeting.text: Cid. I was hoping to find you here. This won't take long.

what_want.speaker: Agent Harlow
what_want.text: Just to finish what we started. One more sequence. Then I'm out of your hair.

know_what.speaker: Agent Harlow
know_what.text: Do you. And what am I?

closing_up.speaker: Agent Harlow
closing_up.text: This will only take a moment. You've been very cooperative Cid. I'd hate to end on an incomplete.

confrontation.speaker: Agent Harlow
confrontation.text: I see. Someone's been talking to you.

choices.text: Is it true? Am I a sleeper agent?

enough_people.speaker: Agent Harlow
enough_people.text: Then you already know the answer. The question is what you do with it.

direct_question.speaker: Agent Harlow
direct_question.text: That's a loaded word. You're an asset. There's a difference.

back_down.speaker: Agent Harlow
back_down.text: You're not wrong. But it doesn't change the evening's agenda.

harlow_pitch.speaker: Agent Harlow
harlow_pitch.text: You were placed here because you needed rest. The program felt you'd earned it. Four years is a long sabbatical.

harlow_pitch_2.speaker: Agent Harlow
harlow_pitch_2.text: But the world didn't stop while you were resting. And you still have obligations.

choices.text: What happens if I say no?
What would I have to do?

dont_remember.speaker: Agent Harlow
dont_remember.text: That's by design. The sequence restores access. Think of it as a key.

say_no.speaker: Agent Harlow
say_no.text: Then you walk away. And tomorrow you feel fine. And the day after that. And eventually you forget this conversation ever happened.

what_do.speaker: Agent Harlow
what_do.text: You finish the sequence tonight. Then you receive a briefing. Then you go back to being exactly who you've always been. More or less.

final_sequence.speaker: Agent Harlow
final_sequence.text: Ready? The final keyword sequence is: Meridian. Stillwater. Home.

choices.text: What happens when I say those words?

what_happens.speaker: Agent Harlow
what_happens.text: You remember. That's all. The rest follows naturally.

comply.speaker: Agent Harlow
comply.text: Good. Give it a moment. It will feel like waking up.

refuse.speaker: Agent Harlow
refuse.text: Alright. I can't force it. But Cid — whatever you're planning tonight. Be careful. The people helping you have their own agendas.

farewell.speaker: Agent Harlow
farewell.text: Good night Cid. One way or another.

greeting_return.speaker: Agent Harlow
greeting_return.text: The sequence stands. Whenever you're ready.
